final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup
Composition: hero section with left column text area, center model subject, right column product display and stat cards
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: beauty e-commerce landing page with floral accents, purple flowers, benefit cards at bottom
Lighting/mood: soft lighting
Color palette: soft pink and white
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す"
Constraints: pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, pink checkmarks for bullet points, floating white rounded stat cards with gold accents, horizontal white rounded benefit cards with icons, 5 navigation links, 2 CTA buttons, 2 product items (dropper bottle and packaging box), 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards
Avoid:
